items.text:
Most solo founders do not need a bigger content strategy.

They need a weekly ritual:
- check the numbers
- write down what shipped
- say what broke
- share one honest lesson

That is usually enough signal for a real build-in-public update.

I think this is where build in public gets interesting.

The best updates are not polished content. They are specific traces of what actually changed: shipped, stuck, learned, measured.
